name: Refinery
description: Library component. Shared merge queue. Receives MergeReady from polecats, notifies MRs of processing and completion. Sequential: one MR at a time. Two-polecat/two-MR capacity. v0.3: added NotifiedMR1/NotifiedMR2 intermediate states to enforce Processing-before-Merged ordering on the MR_NOTIFY channel. Without this, the random simulator could send Merged before Processing, deadlocking the MR.

MR_NOTIFY1.description: notifies MR 1 of processing and merge completion.

MR_NOTIFY2.description: notifies MR 2 of processing and merge completion.

actors.name: Refinery
actors.owner: Shared merge queue. Sequential. Intermediate NotifiedMR states enforce Processing-then-Merged ordering.

triples.event: notify MR1 it is being processed
MR1 merged: notify and return to idle
notify MR2 it is being processed
MR2 merged: notify and return to idle
